name: io.github.lanternrow/linkedin-pages-mcp
description: LinkedIn Company Page analytics — follower, page, post, and video statistics (read-only).

environmentVariables.description: LinkedIn 3-legged member access token (Page admin consented)
environmentVariables.name: LINKEDIN_ACCESS_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: OAuth app client id (enables automatic token refresh)
environmentVariables.name: LINKEDIN_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: OAuth app client secret (enables automatic token refresh)
environmentVariables.name: LINKEDIN_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: API version YYYYMM (defaults to latest known-good)
environmentVariables.name: LINKEDIN_VERSION
